definitions.text: bli slått i bakken så hardt at en blir liggende
definitions.translation: to be knocked down so hard that one remains lying

examples.no: spilleren gikk rett i isen og måtte ta telling
examples.en: the player went straight down on the ice and had to take a count

examples.no: spilleren måtte ta telling på benken etter taklingen
examples.en: the player had to take a count on the bench after the hit
